headline: Wedbush Upgrades Cognizant (CTSH) to Outperform
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free American Stocks to Invest In. On June 8, 2026, Wedbush analyst Steven Wahrhaftig upgraded Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) to Outperform from Neutral with a price target of $70, up from $56 previously. headline: Berenberg downgrades Cognizant as AI risks cloud IT services outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence-driven disruption is increasing pressure on the IT services industry, prompting Berenberg to turn more cautious on the sector as concerns grow over AI-led pricing deflation, uncertain value capture and a lack of near-term catalysts for a valuation recovery.

headline: Is Innodata Emerging as a Key AI Data Partner to Big Tech?
summary: INOD's AI data momentum is accelerating as Big Tech demand lifts revenues, expands key customer ties and strengthens its role in model development.
